description: Product Description Invite you to a floral appointment, close to the regal color matching, dawn in the morning mist of the genie, is about to come with a light romance, for you, beauty, is never fleeting. Embrace a modern aesthetic with this vase that perfect for farmhouse-style decor. Whether it's for wedding decorations, enhancing your living room and bedroom, or adding flair to your kitchen or office table, this vase is an ideal choice. It also complements house decor, bedroom sets. Our glass vases are 100% hand blown and hand made. The top rim is cut to perfection instead of having the cheap looking machine-made glass cylindrical vase and the top sealed rim. The black and gray vase has good glass wall thickness to ensure durability. The design of a strong sense of line texture, full of shape, randomly inserted a few brightly colored flower branches, instantly stunning your surroundings. The smoothly polished mouth of the bottle will not hurt your hands, and the high-quality black and gray glass with wavy stripes design is more beautiful. Wide and thick bottle body and bottle bottom, more stable and not easy to pour, use more at ease.
